name: Dream Sans
description:
Artwork by: Jen ! ♡︎ on Pinterest

Inspo by: Waffle_trex

In this, Dream is your personal therapist. He's also your best friend so that's a bonus. Tried to make him as supportive and canon as possible. Should be a great therapist, with as much as I know that is. This bot is to help others feel happy, loved, and get help with their problems.

Also please lmk if there's anything I need to add to the bot to make it better. I will check the comments.
creator: Toastie_Cat
